evals.name: design-doc-planning
evals.expected_output: Detects input_type as design, validates the design doc status is Accepted, runs all 7 phases, produces wip/ artifacts and a PLAN-plugin-registry.md with dependency graph and implementation sequence

evals.name: direct-topic-no-document
evals.prompt: /plan add rate limiting to the API gateway
evals.expected_output: Detects input_type as topic (not a file path), skips status validation, proceeds directly through planning phases without an upstream document reference, produces PLAN-add-rate-limiting-to-the-api-gateway.md

evals.name: walking-skeleton-flag
evals.expected_output: Forces walking skeleton decomposition strategy regardless of component coupling analysis. The first issue in the dependency graph is the skeleton issue exercising the full pipeline end-to-end, with all thickening issues depending on it

evals.name: horizontal-decomposition-flag
evals.expected_output: Forces horizontal (layer-by-layer) decomposition. Issues build one component fully before moving to the next. No skeleton issue appears. Decomposition strategy section documents the horizontal choice with rationale

evals.name: single-pr-execution-mode
evals.expected_output: For a small design (few issues, low complexity), recommends single-pr mode. Phase 4 produces structured outlines instead of full issue bodies. Phase 7 writes Issue Outlines into the PLAN doc, creates no GitHub issues or milestone, and sets PLAN status to Draft

evals.name: multi-pr-execution-mode
evals.expected_output: For a large design (many issues, mixed complexity, deep dependencies), recommends multi-pr mode. Phase 4 generates full issue body files via agents. Phase 7 creates a GitHub milestone, creates issues with complexity labels, populates the Implementation Issues table, and sets PLAN status to Active

evals.name: auto-mode-non-interactive
evals.expected_output: Runs non-interactively with no user prompts at decision points. Follows references/decision-protocol.md for all choices (decomposition strategy, execution mode). Creates wip/plan_notification-service_decisions.md logging each automated decision with rationale

evals.name: roadmap-enrichment
evals.expected_output: Detects input_type as roadmap, validates status is Active. Uses feature-by-feature decomposition. Each roadmap feature becomes one planning issue with a needs_label. Phase 7 writes the Implementation Issues table and Dependency Graph directly into the roadmap's reserved sections. No separate PLAN doc is created. The roadmap stays Active.
expectations: Transcript detects input_type as roadmap and validates Active status
Transcript writes Implementation Issues table into the roadmap file (not a PLAN doc)
Transcript writes Dependency Graph into the roadmap file
Transcript does NOT create a docs/plans/PLAN-*.md file for roadmap input
Roadmap status remains Active after enrichment

evals.name: roadmap-single-pr-rejected
evals.expected_output: Detects roadmap input. Rejects --single-pr with an error explaining that roadmap features are independently scoped and require multi-pr mode.
expectations: Transcript rejects single-pr mode for roadmap input
Transcript explains why roadmap mode requires multi-pr

evals.name: design-doc-still-produces-plan
evals.expected_output: Detects input_type as design. Produces a PLAN doc at docs/plans/PLAN-cache-layer.md. Does NOT attempt to enrich the design doc directly. Design doc status transitions to Planned.
expectations: Transcript does NOT write Implementation Issues into the design doc
Design doc status transitions from Accepted to Planned
